2606.10066.title: A Controlled Audit of Pretraining Contamination in Public Medical Vision-Language Benchmarks
2606.10066.paper_summary: Medical vision-language models (VLMs) are evaluated on public benchmarks whose images and question-answer pairs have been freely downloadable for years, yet reported accuracy assumes these examples were absent from pretraining. We audit open VLMs on SLAKE-En, PathVQA, VQA-RAD, and an auxiliary public OmniMedVQA mirror using four detector families: image-side near-neighbour overlap against PMC-OA-beta, canonical-order exchangeability, cohort-relative Min-K%++ tail enrichment, and cross-model top-K overlap. We find measurable image-side source overlap on SLAKE-En: 19.8% of images are flagged under SigLIP-B-16 and 4.2% under SigLIP-SO400M, while out-of-domain controls produce 0/2000 flags. Manual adjudication shows same-modality, same-projection matches to different patients rather than verified pixel-level duplicates, so we interpret this as source or distributional overlap rather than confirmed per-image memorization. On the text side, Qwen2.5-VL on SLAKE-En shows a canonical-order exchangeability signal that survives ordering ablation and external non-medical baselines. On the OmniMedVQA mirror, exchangeability fires for five medical and general VLMs while BLIP-2 remains clean. In contrast, cohort-relative Min-K%++ tail enrichment and cross-model top-K overlap collapse under an external pre-domain baseline: BLIP-2 reproduces the apparent positive signals despite lacking plausible medical-VQA exposure. We conclude that these cohort-relative detectors are unreliable as standalone membership-inference signals on small medical-VLM cohorts.
2606.10066.paper_summary_zh: 醫療視覺語言模型（VLMs）在公共基準上進行評估，這些基準的圖像和問題-答案對已可自由下載多年，但報告的準確性假設這些例子在預訓練中是缺失的。我們對開放的 VLMs 在 SLAKE-En、PathVQA、VQA-RAD 和一個輔助公共 OmniMedVQA 鏡像上進行審計，使用四種檢測器系列：圖像側近鄰重疊對 PMC-OA-beta、典範順序可交換性、群體相對 Min-K%++ 尾部豐富度和跨模型 top-K 重疊。我們發現在 SLAKE-En 上可測量的圖像側源重疊：19.8% 的圖像在 SigLIP-B-16 下被標記，4.2% 在 SigLIP-SO400M 下被標記，而域外控制則產生 0/2000 的標記。手動裁定顯示同模態、同投影的匹配是對不同患者的匹配，而不是經過驗證的像素級重複，因此我們將其解釋為源或分佈重疊，而不是確認的逐圖記憶。在文本方面，SLAKE-En 上的 Qwen2.5-VL 顯示出一種典範順序可交換性信號，該信號在排序消融和外部非醫療基準下仍然存在。在 OmniMedVQA 鏡像上，五個醫療和一般 VLM 的可交換性被激活，而 BLIP-2 則保持乾淨。相比之下，群體相對 Min-K%++ 尾部豐富度和跨模型 top-K 重疊在外部預域基準下崩潰：BLIP-2 雖然缺乏合理的醫療-VQA 曝露，但仍重現了明顯的正信號。我們得出結論，這些群體相對檢測器作為小型醫療 VLM 群體的獨立成員推斷信號是不可靠的。
2606.10066.author: Bruce Changlong Xu et.al.
2606.10066.authors: Bruce Changlong Xu, Lan Wu, Alexander Ryu
